title: pseudolysimachion orchideum
intro: Pseudolysimachion orchideum, also known as the orchid false lyssionotus, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds. Pseudolysimachion orchideum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues.
